findings.description: The second sentence compares errorsタグ and errorタグ behavior, but this comparison does not appear in the provided source. The source excerpt ends at the anchor `.. _WebView_ErrorViewErrorTag:` with no content for the errorタグ section shown. The statement 'errorsタグがフィルタ条件に従ってエラーメッセージをリスト表示するのに対し、errorタグは特定の入力項目に対するエラーメッセージを個別に出力する' appears to be an AI-synthesized inference rather than text from the source.
findings.source_evidence:
Source ends at '.. _WebView_ErrorViewErrorTag:
